tooltip.easy-freecam.horizontal_speed: How fast the freecam moves sideways and forward.
tooltip.easy-freecam.vertical_speed: How fast the freecam moves up and down.
tooltip.easy-freecam.sprint_multiplier: How much faster sprint mode moves the freecam.
tooltip.easy-freecam.show_hand: Render the held item and hand while freecam is active.
tooltip.easy-freecam.show_player: Keep your real player model visible while using freecam.
tooltip.easy-freecam.disable_on_damage: Automatically return to your player when you take damage.
